message:
feat(cli,test): expand count/stale commands and add e2e test coverage

- Expand count command with additional output options
- Expand stale command with additional detection criteria
- Add e2e_stale test suite with comprehensive stale detection scenarios
- Expand e2e_queries test coverage
- Update Cargo.lock
